query:
-- 4. 创建颜色（01 - 白色）
INSERT INTO material_colors (boardId, colorCode, colorName, fullCode, imageUrl, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT mb.id, '01', '白色', CONCAT(ms.code, '-', mb.boardNumber, '-', '01'), 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/bbFqbJnygZTsgwKd.jpg', 'active', NOW(), NOW()
FROM material_boards mb
JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
WHERE ms.code = 'DAV' AND mb.boardNumber = 'A01'
LIMIT 1;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute -- 4. 创建颜色（01 - 白色）
INSERT INTO material_colors (boardId, colorCode, colorName, fullCode, imageUrl, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT mb.id, '01', '白色', CONCAT(ms.code, '-', mb.boardNumber, '-', '01'), 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663334223494/bbFqbJnygZTsgwKd.jpg', 'active', NOW(), NOW()
FROM material_boards mb
JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
WHERE ms.code = 'DAV' AND mb.boardNumber = 'A01'
LIMIT 1;
